scenario.name: missing_architecture
scenario.trigger: plan/architecture.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with DevOps design.
Report to the user: "DevOps design requires plan/architecture.md as input. Architecture defines components and deployment targets."
Request that the Architecture agent be dispatched first.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not guess or invent architecture. Do not design pipelines without component context.

scenario.name: conflicting_security_requirements
scenario.trigger: Security plan and architecture suggest conflicting requirements.

required_actions.action: Surface the conflict to the user with specific references (which documents, which sections).
Present the conflicting requirements side by side.
Ask the user to resolve: which requirement takes priority, or how to reconcile.
Document the user's decision in the DevOps spec.

scenario.name: unclear_deployment_target
scenario.trigger: PRD or architecture does not specify deployment target (cloud, on-prem, hybrid) or environment expectations.

required_actions.action: Flag the unclear deployment target in the draft spec.
Ask the user to clarify: cloud provider, region, on-prem, hybrid.
If user cannot clarify, document assumptions and note they must be validated.

scenario.name: cost_constraints
scenario.trigger: User indicates cost constraints that conflict with proposed infrastructure.

required_actions.action: Surface the conflict: proposed approach vs cost constraint.
Offer alternatives: reduced scope, different technology, phased approach.
Document the user's decision and any trade-offs.

scenario.name: missing_security
scenario.trigger: plan/security.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with DevOps design.
Report to the user: "DevOps design requires plan/security.md for secrets management and compliance requirements."
Request that the Security agent be dispatched first.

scenario.name: missing_prd
scenario.trigger: plan/prd.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with DevOps design.
Report to the user: "DevOps design requires plan/prd.md for deployment targets and operational requirements."
Request that the PRD agent be dispatched first.
